summary: Discovered 13 verified source candidates and 7 rejections for Stanford University. Sources span: university-wide BCA policy, UIT security/privacy guidance, CTL/AIMES teaching guidance hub, GSB course policy templates, school-specific policies (Medicine, Law, PWR), approved tools (AI Playground), UIT AI hub, marketing/comms guidelines, and the AISAC advisory committee report. Key finding: Stanford has a layered policy ecosystem — a core BCA guidance (Feb 2023) that treats AI use as analogous to receiving help from another person, supplemented by school-specific policies (Medicine, Law, GSB, PWR), IT security guidance from UIT, and teaching resources from CTL/AIMES. HAI research center pages were excluded per instructions. News articles and third-party analyses were rejected as non-policy sources.
